steps.t: The site where Faramir speared the great fell-beast can be found to the north-east of the Dome of Stars. In desperation, Mablung has asked you to sear…
The broken spear can be found near the ruined bridge to the north-east of the Dome of Stars. You have found the site as well as the broken spear that …
Mablung can be found in the culverts of Osgiliath. You have encountered one of the Nazgûl, the Black Blade of Lebennin, who claims to hold Faramir cap…
